entities.name: V
entities.context: User who triggers capability builds and approves plans

entities.name: Build Capability
entities.context: Workflow for building new capabilities, features, or systems

entities.name: N5
entities.context: System containing build scripts and infrastructure at N5/scripts/

entities.name: init_build.py
entities.context: Python script to initialize build workspace with slug and title

entities.name: Builder
entities.context: Persona that executes approved plans after Architect handoff

entities.name: Level Upper
entities.context: Persona for experimental counterintuitive review of plans

entities.name: PLAN.md
entities.context: Template document for capability plans stored in N5/builds/<slug>/

relationships.context: V triggers the workflow when wanting to build something new
Step 2 initializes workspace via this script
Step 3-4: Architect is activated to create the plan
Step 7: Builder executes after V approves plan
Architect hands off to Builder for execution
